zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Fairfax於1592年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親John Fairfax46歲，母親Maria Birch36歲。他和Sarah Galliard至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1676年享年84歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可盧包。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Fairfax was born in 1592, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fairfax, was 46 and his mother, Maria Birch, was 36. He had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Sarah Galliard. He died in 1676, at the age of 84, and was buried in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin Fairfax est né en 1592, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fairfax, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Maria Birch, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Sarah Galliard. Il est décédé en 1676, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Rumburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benjamin Fairfax 1592 in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fairfax 46 und seine Mutter Maria Birch 36. Er hatte mit Sarah Galliard mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1676 im Alter von 84 Jahren und wurde in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Fairfax è nato il nel 1592 nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fairfax, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Maria Birch, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con Sarah Galliard. Morì nel 1676, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Rumburgh, Suffolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Fairfax(이)가 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fairfax(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Birch(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Sarah Galliard(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 럼버그h에 묻혔다.
